subcodes.first_line: The manuscript hath reached the Wronged One, and the servant in attendance before Him hath laid it before Him. We have answered thee with this perspicuous Tablet which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی المظلوم کتابک و عرضه العبد الحاضر اجبناک بهذا اللوح المبین الذی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as sun, @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
